title: Portable blender customer reviews
evidence_text: Review text: It leaves chunks in frozen fruit. Multiple reviews say the portable blender leaves chunks in frozen fruit smoothies.
raw_user_quote: It leaves chunks in frozen fruit.
user_problem: Users complain frozen fruit leaves chunks and the blade stalls.
frequency_evidence: Multiple review snippets mention chunks and stalling.
requested_fix: Set frozen fruit test before sourcing.
parameter_to_verify: Frozen fruit chunk size after 3 cycles.
supplier_test: Run frozen fruit and ice test.
